anchors.name: Identity Provisioning
anchors.description: Mechanisms exist to establish, activate, modify, review, disable, and remove identifiers and credentials.

anchors.name: Periodic Access Review
anchors.description: Mechanisms exist to periodically review the access rights of users.

anchors.name: Change Authorization
anchors.description: Mechanisms exist to authorize changes prior to implementation.

anchors.name: Vendor Due Diligence
anchors.description: Mechanisms exist to perform due diligence on prospective third parties.

anchors.name: Vulnerability Scanning Cadence
anchors.description: Mechanisms exist to scan for vulnerabilities on a defined cadence.
